title: Suspension of the Accreditation of Principal/Employer or Deactivation
content: 21 of Vessel Enrollment. Upon the written order of the Secretary, or the latter’s duly 22 authorized representative, the accreditation and/or vessel enrollment of a 23 principal/employer shall be suspended or deactivated for a period not exceeding sixty 24 (60) calendar days, based on any of the following grounds: 25 26 a. Refusal or unreasonable failure to act on any request for assistance or 27 repatriation of distressed seafarers; 28 29 b. Deliberate violation/non-compliance of the principal/employer with its contractual 30 and/or legal obligations to its hired seafarer/s, including, but not limited to, 31 abandonment cases, harassment and bullying cases, sexual assault and sexual 32 harassment cases; 33 34 c. When found to have hired and employed a seafarer who is a minor; 35 36 d. Continued processing and deployment of the seafarers for the principal/employer 37 will lead to the further exploitation of any or all of its applicants and seafarers or 38 pose imminent danger to the lives and safety of its seafarer/s; or 39 40 e. Other circumstances analogous to the foregoing as determined by the DMW. 41 42
